sql_array: CREATE TABLE date_test (id INT, start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
INSERT INTO date_test (id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-10-01', DATE '2023-10-15');
INSERT INTO date_test (id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (2, DATE '2022-01-20', DATE '2022-01-05');
UPDATE date_test SET start_date = least(start_date, end_date) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, least(start_date, end_date) AS earliest_date FROM date_test;
